inputs.per_share_source: Marvin filings: FY26 guided EBITDA midpoint × 18% FCF conversion / shares (haircut vs 25% company target); proof-first bridge 2026-07-21.
inputs.normalization_note: Primary metric = Marvin filings owner cash; McIntyre external context only

segments.label: Point of Care
segments.evidence: FY2025 revenue $601.6M (-13.4% YoY); FT Jun 27 2026 divestiture scenario

options.label: POC unit sale (unconfirmed)
options.base_terminal_rationale: $1,500M proceeds less attributed net debt paydown / 67.8M shares — scenario overlay not in Lawrence base
options.evidence: FT report Jun 27 2026 via Seeking Alpha; not company confirmed

options.label: LEX / molecular platform
options.base_terminal_rationale: P=25% x $200M peak value / shares; company guided ~$50M launch drag 2026
options.evidence: FY2025 molecular revenue $26.5M; Q1 FY2026 commentary

options.label: Donor screening exit
options.base_terminal_rationale: U.S. business exit in progress; $52.6M FY25 revenue

marvin_floor.notes: Haircut owner cash from guided EBITDA

external.notes: 15x on 2028 FCF; 2.5yr frame; put hedge on fund position

base.notes: Marvin filings primary — independent of McIntyre normalization

stance_proposal.override_reason: Marvin filings primary; moat unproven; POC catalyst unconfirmed

option_scan.question: POC divestiture process?
option_scan.evidence: Seeking Alpha / FT; not SEC confirmed

paths.label: Marvin floor (filings stress)
paths.weight_why: Stress floor from primary docs; anchors pessimistic bound.

paths.label: Marvin filings primary (segment + owner cash)
paths.notes: Independent of McIntyre normalization; segment overlay
paths.weight_why: Primary holding-period path from SEC filings and guided EBITDA FCF bridge.

paths.label: McIntyre Partnerships Q1 2026
paths.notes: 15x on 2028 FCF; 2.5yr frame; put hedge on fund position
paths.weight_why: Triangulation lane; capped when already in blended_best to avoid double-count.

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

top_dissents.label: Marathon / Capital Returns
top_dissents.falsifier: Supply response, reinvestment requirements, or incremental returns cannot be measured.

top_dissents.label: Howard Marks / Oaktree
top_dissents.falsifier: Debt maturities, refinancing exposure, liquidity, or downside recovery cannot be reconciled.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete non-overlapping component schedule. The legacy Lawrence return path remains a separate stance gate until the primary evidence bridges are complete.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Phase 3 scaffold identifies every currently known material operating, financial, liability, reserve, and option claim once. Primary ownership and cash/NAV bridges remain open follow-up gates.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from FY2025 10-K and Q1 FY2026 10-Q: revenue $2,730.2M, adj EBITDA $597M, FY26 guide $615–630M, cash $169.8M, net debt ~$2,380M, diluted shares 67.8M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile the range to primary filings, a reproducible owner-cash or NAV bridge, and the identified liability and capital claims before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

source.locator: Labs revenue $1,505.7M (+4.5% YoY) FY2025 segment note
Immunohematology revenue $543.8M (+3.1% YoY) FY2025 segment note

assumptions.label: Labs plus immunohematology share of guided EBITDA
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 segment EBITDA $482M of $597M consolidated; applied to FY26 guide.

assumptions.label: Owner-cash conversion on core EBITDA
assumptions.rationale: Haircut vs 25% company target; LEX drag and China working-capital timing.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5 on core owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence scenario envelope from valuation.json.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7 on core owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Fade after turnaround stabilization.

assumptions.label: Required return on core owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Leverage and reimbursement risk premium.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Peer-discounted diagnostics multiples on recurring core.

assumptions.label: Component schedule reconciliation factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves Phase-3 component schedule while filing facts anchor core EBITDA bridge.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from FY2025 10-K and Q1 FY2026 10-Q: revenue $2,730.2M, adj EBITDA $597M, FY26 guide $615–630M, cash $169.8M, net debt ~$2,380M, diluted shares 67.8M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

assumptions.label: Gross POC divestiture proceeds
assumptions.rationale: Proceeds net of transaction costs; debt paydown modeled separately.

assumptions.label: LEX / molecular platform success probability
assumptions.rationale: Company guided ~$50M launch drag in 2026.

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted peak value of molecular option
assumptions.rationale: Probability-weighted milestone value; not in Lawrence base IRR.

assumptions.label: Net incremental option value per share
assumptions.rationale: POC plus LEX options after overlap control vs core operating engine.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from FY2025 10-K and Q1 FY2026 10-Q: revenue $2,730.2M, adj EBITDA $597M, FY26 guide $615–630M, cash $169.8M, net debt ~$2,380M, diluted shares 67.8M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

source.locator: Total debt approximately $2,550M including current portion FY2025
Net debt ~$2,380M (total debt less cash) per FY2025 10-K

assumptions.label: Reimbursement, integration, leverage, and failure reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for China reimbursement, LEX drag, POC sale failure, and covenant stress; not full net debt double-count.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of QDEL, including every currently identified operating claim, financial claim, liability, reserve, and material option.
economic_claim.unit_source: Derived from inputs.shares_millions in the pre-existing valuation.json; [HUMAN REVIEW] confirm against the latest primary filing.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are separate components or explicitly reserved. No component is intended to overlap another.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Existing research and filing-derived valuation inputs. The primary-source reconciliation remains an open evidence gate.

component_groups.label: Labs and immunohematology owner cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
component_groups.adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key core_diagnostics_engine; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Point-of-care, LEX, and molecular options
component_groups.valuation_basis: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
component_groups.adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key product_and_pipeline_options; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is explicit analyst judgment pending a primary-source milestone and ownership reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: The range includes delay and failure outcomes; dated cash realization remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital, financing, and dilution are reserved until the primary sources-and-uses bridge is complete.

component_groups.label: Net debt and working-capital claims
component_groups.valuation_basis: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
component_groups.adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key net_financial_claims; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Reimbursement, integration, and failure reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
component_groups.adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key downside_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

limitations: Phase 3 schedule scaffold, not a committee-approved valuation.
Universal followups remain open until primary evidence supports the ownership map, owner-cash or NAV bridge, and downside/capital claims.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Labs and immunohematology owner cash
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

method_route.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.
